text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the Mainichi Hai, Yaeno
Muteki asks me who I think she should keep an
eye on during the race. My answer is Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is a racer from Kasamatsu whose
impressive talent has garnered a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Mainichi Hai. Yaeno Muteki finds
herself unsettled by Oguri Cap's seeming lack of
competitive driving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she doesn't let that distract her. Yaeno
Muteki rallies her spirit and focuses her attention
on the race!
